_comment: Canonical HTTP request shape both SDKs (TS + Py) must produce for client.records.get('a'.repeat(64)) against base_url 'http://test.example' with API key 'sk-cw-live-b<52 chars>'. Parity is asserted in packages/sdk-ts/src/client/records.test.ts and packages/sdk-py/tests/test_client_records.py. A divergence between the two languages on URL, method, or auth header surfaces as a test failure on one side.
